headline: 4 Insurance Brokerage Stocks to Gain From Demand and M&A
summary: Zacks Insurance Brokerage players like AJG, AON, BRO and WTW are likely to benefit from increased demand for insurance products, strategic acquisitions and the adoption of technology.
